metaDescription: Starter · Pro · Agency — monthly or yearly billing. All PDF tools, unlimited file sizes, no ads.

hero.title: Pick the plan that fits you
hero.subtitle: All plans include every PDF and image tool. Upgrade for bigger files, faster processing, and zero ads.

billing.saveAnnually: 🎉 You save up to $98/year with annual billing

freeBanner.title: Free Plan — always available
freeBanner.subtitle: All tools · 100 MB limit · 1-hour retention · Ads shown

toolLimits.title: Per-tool limits
toolLimits.subtitle: Exact file size and batch count limits for every tool, broken down by plan.

items.q: What is the difference between monthly and yearly billing?
items.a: Monthly billing charges you each month. Yearly billing charges you once a year at a discounted rate — equivalent to 2 months free (you pay for 10, get 12). You can choose your preferred billing cycle at checkout.
Yes — cancel with one click from your account subscription page. Your plan stays active until the end of the current billing period, then reverts to Free automatically. No hidden charges.

items.q: Can I switch between monthly and yearly after subscribing?
items.a: To switch billing cycles, cancel your current plan and re-subscribe with the new cycle. Your Pro access continues until your current period ends.
All major credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, RuPay), UPI, net banking, and wallets — securely processed via Razorpay. All transactions are PCI-DSS compliant.

items.q: What happens to my files after the retention period?
items.a: Files are permanently deleted from our servers automatically. We never sell or share your files. All transfers are SSL-encrypted.
Yes — if you're not satisfied within 7 days of your first charge, contact us for a full refund. No questions asked.

items.q: Does the Agency plan support multiple users?
items.a: Yes — Agency includes 5 team seats. Each seat gets its own login with shared billing under one account. Need more? Contact us.

bottomCta.title: Ready to upgrade?
bottomCta.subtitle: Join thousands of professionals using SmallPDF.us every day. Cancel anytime.

notices.checkoutCancelled: Checkout cancelled — no charge was made.
